prompt: Set up a spacecraft in a 500 km circular low-Earth orbit at 51.6 degrees inclination, propagate for one day, and report the altitude and semi-major axis.
intent: A single spacecraft on a ~500 km circular LEO (SMA about 6878 km, ECC about 0, inclination 51.6 deg), propagated for about one day, with a ReportFile recording altitude and semi-major axis.

candidates.note: correct 500 km circular LEO at 51.6 deg
structurally complete but a GEO orbit at 0 deg, not a 500 km / 51.6 deg LEO
no ReportFile / Report at all -> missing required type+command (structural catch)

prompt: Propagate the ISS for 90 minutes and report its geodetic latitude and longitude.
intent: A spacecraft (ISS-like LEO) propagated for about 90 minutes (5400 s), with a ReportFile recording the spacecraft's latitude and longitude.

candidates.note: reports SMA and ECC instead of latitude/longitude (wrong quantities)
hallucinated resource type 'Spcecraft' -> lint ERROR (structural catch)

prompt: Raise the apogee of a 500 km circular orbit using a single prograde impulsive burn.
intent: Starting from a ~500 km circular LEO, one prograde (along-velocity, +Element1) impulsive maneuver is applied that increases the orbit's apogee / energy.

candidates.note: prograde burn (+Element1) then maneuver -> raises apogee
retrograde burn (-Element1) -> lowers the orbit, does not raise apogee

prompt: Set up a sun-synchronous orbit at about 700 km altitude.
intent: A spacecraft in a sun-synchronous orbit at ~700 km altitude: SMA ~7078 km, near-circular, with the sun-synchronous (retrograde, ~98 deg) inclination.

candidates.note: inclination 28.5 deg -> NOT sun-synchronous despite the right altitude

prompt: Use a differential corrector to target an apogee radius of 8000 km by varying an impulsive burn.
intent: A targeting sequence using a DifferentialCorrector that varies an impulsive burn and achieves an apogee radius (RMAG at apoapsis) of 8000 km.

candidates.note: structurally a valid target loop but achieves RMAG = 42164 (GEO), not 8000

prompt: Propagate the spacecraft and write its trajectory to a CCSDS-OEM ephemeris file.
intent: A spacecraft propagated with an EphemerisFile output whose format is CCSDS-OEM.

candidates.note: EphemerisFile present but FileFormat = STK-TimePosVel, not CCSDS-OEM
